goal: Move the existing Thursday 2pm appointment to a later day.
success_criteria: The agent locates/acknowledges the existing appointment and confirms a new time, or explains how to reschedule.

lines.text: Esta llamada puede ser grabada para propósitos de calidad y entrenamiento.
Oh, hi there. No, this is David Kim calling. I actually have an appointment this Thursday at 2 p.m., but I need to reschedule it.
Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of Pretty Good AI. Am I speaking with Maria?
Sure, it's David Kim, and my date of birth is July 12, 1985.
Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient who needs to reschedule the appointment.
Just to confirm, I have your name as David Kim, and your date of birth is July 12, 1985. Is that correct?

Would you like me to look up your record using the phone number you have on file with us? If so, please tell me that number. If you're not sure I can confirm your name and date of birth again, just let me know what you prefer.
I can give you the phone number. It's 555-213-7790.
I have your phone number as 555-213-7790.
and your date of birth is July 12, 1985. Is that correct?
I can't help with rescheduling right now, but I can connect you to our patient support team for help. Please stay on the line while I transfer your call.
connecting you to a representative. Please wait.
Oh, okay. Well, thanks anyway. Goodbye.
Hello, you've reached the pretty good AI test line. Goodbye.
